name_en: Palais des Festivals et des Congrès
name_local: Palais des Festivals et des Congrès

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are public events happening at the Palais this week
phrases.text_local: Des événements ouverts au public sont-ils prévus au Palais cette semaine ?
phrases.pronunciation: day zay-VEH-neh-man oo-VEHR oh pyoo-BLEEK son-TEEL pray-VYOO oh pah-LAY SET seh-MEN
phrases.cultural_note: Outside the May Film Festival, the Palais hosts trade fairs, concerts and conferences throughout the year.

responses.english: Check the programme at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the famous handprints of film stars
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les empreintes des étoiles du cinéma sur l'Allée des Étoiles ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV lay am-PRANT day zay-TWAL doo see-nay-MAH soor lah-LAY day zay-TWAL
phrases.cultural_note: The Allée des Étoiles paved path in front of the Palais holds over 300 handprints of festival legends.

responses.english: On the forecourt, in front of the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are tours of the Palais available
phrases.text_local: Des visites guidées du Palais des Festivals sont-elles organisées ?
phrases.pronunciation: day vee-ZEET gee-DAY doo pah-LAY day fes-tee-VAL son-TEL or-gah-nee-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tours include the famous red-carpeted Grand Auditorium Lumière where the Palme d'Or is awarded.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to access the roof terrace for the view
phrases.text_local: Comment accéder à la terrasse panoramique sur le toit du Palais ?
phrases.pronunciation: kuh-MAN ak-say-DAY ah lah teh-RAS pah-no-rah-MEEK soor leh TWAH doo pah-LAY
phrases.cultural_note: The rooftop terrace offers spectacular views over the bay and is accessible during certain public events and tours.

responses.english: It's not accessible to the public.
responses.phonetic: suh neh pah ak-ses-EEBL oh poo-BLEEK
responses.french: Ce n'est pas accessible au public.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the next film festival takes place
phrases.text_local: Le prochain Festival de Cannes, c'est quand ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh proh-SHEHN fes-tee-VAL duh KAN, seh KAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The Cannes Film Festival takes place annually in May, usually over about two weeks.
